titleStmt.title: SII 23.434: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 434. (A.R. No. 434 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the same wall Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 7

summary.p: The details of date are given as Makara, śu. 3, Friday, Mṛigaśīrsha which are however found to be irregular if we take the record to be assignable to Sundara Pāṇḍya of acc. A.D. 1276.

The inscription records another gift of contribution by toll by the same mercantile bodies mentioned above for the maintenance of a flower-garden called Rājākkaṇāyaṉ-tirunandavaṉam for the temple. The donors are said to have met in the temple mentioned in No. 430 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— koṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu muṉṟāntiyati yum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśiriṣattu nāḷ kiḻaivaṭṭai patiṉeṇmiṣaiyattomum nālunakarap patiṉeṇmiṣaiyattomum tarakaromum civallavaṉ paṭaiviṭṭil Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvara muṭai
yanāyiṉār koyilil niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Uṭai yār tiruppūlāntuṟai Uṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku tirunantavaṉamāṉatu tirup pūlāntuṟaik kuḷakkiḻ kalmaṭaikku meṟkil Āṭkoṇṭatevar taṉmamāṉa Irācākkaṇāyaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku tirunantavaṉappuṟamāka kalveṭṭik kuṭutta paṭṭaṇappakuti kiḻakku vaṭakku Eṟṟuppokiṟa pāk kup poti Oṉṟukku
Araimāppaṇamum miḷaku poti Oṉṟukku Orumāppaṇamum Ivvāṇṭu mutal koṇṭu yittirunantavaṉañ ceyvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Uṭaiyār tiruppūlāntuṟai Uṭaiya nāyiṉār koyilil kal veṭṭi k kuṭuttamaikku patiṉeṇ viṣaiyattār paṇikka pākaṉūr vallavapurattu ciṟṟampūr kiḻavaṉ tirumukkūṭalāṇṭāṉ kūttaṉ pati ṉeṇ
Digital edition of SII 23.434 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
